final:
// // This module implements a 2-input NOR gate with additional power and ground considerations. Output Y is HIGH when all inputs are LOW.
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output Y
);assign Y = ~(A | B | VPWR | VGND | VPB | VNB);

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-input NOR gate with additional power and ground considerations. Output Y is HIGH when all inputs are LOW.
